All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

B

BASE_PATH - Static variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.shapes.SpriteOverlayFactory
Base classpath directory for all sprites.
BattleShiException - Exception in com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.exceptions
Base checked exception for every domain-level error that the Battle Shi game can raise.
BattleShiException(String) - Constructor for exception com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.exceptions.BattleShiException
Creates a new exception with a descriptive message.
BattleShiException(String, Throwable) - Constructor for exception com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.exceptions.BattleShiException
Creates a new exception with a descriptive message and an underlying cause.
board - Variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.PlacementController
 
Board - Class in com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities
Represents a 10x10 board: the grid of Cell objects and the fleet of Ship instances placed on it.
Board() - Constructor for class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.Board
Creates an empty 10x10 board with every cell set to water.
BOARD_SIZE - Static variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.Coordinate
Number of rows/columns on any board.
boardGridView - Variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.board.BoardSpriteLayer
The associated grid view (used to resolve cell origins).
BoardGridView - Class in com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.board
Builds and owns the visual grid for a single 10x10 board: the column letters (A-J) and row numbers (1-10), the water cells themselves, and a transparent overlay layer where ships and shot markers are placed.
BoardGridView() - Constructor for class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.board.BoardGridView
Builds a new board grid view.
BoardSpriteLayer - Class in com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.board
Manages the PNG sprite ImageView overlays that sit on top of a BoardGridView's overlay layer.
BoardSpriteLayer(BoardGridView) - Constructor for class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.board.BoardSpriteLayer
Creates a sprite layer bound to the given board grid view.
BoardTheme - Class in com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.board
Centralizes every geometric measurement used to build board and ship shapes programmatically.
BoardTheme() - Constructor for class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.board.BoardTheme
 
boardView - Variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.PlacementController
 
buildBackground() - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.board.BoardGridView
 
buildCells() - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.board.BoardGridView
 
buildHeaders() - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.board.BoardGridView
 
buildImageView(Image, double, double) - Static method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.shapes.SpriteOverlayFactory
Builds a non-resizable, pixel-perfect ImageView of the given dimensions.
buildRow(ShipType...) - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.board.ShipTrayView
 
buildShipKey(ShipType, Orientation, boolean) - Static method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.shapes.SpriteOverlayFactory
Builds the cache key for a ship sprite.
buildTurnIndicator() - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.board.BoardGridView
Builds the (initially inactive) border drawn around the 10x10 cell block to signal whose turn it is.
